strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, desktop, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services — directly matching the role's 15-year experience requirement and breadth expectation.
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows, demonstrating current, builder-level fluency in cutting-edge AI tooling.

Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform on Kubernetes) plus startup roles at WatchUp (top-10 US Apple TV app) and RIDE Capital, evidencing the preferred startup/intrapreneurial profile.
concerns: Resume foregrounds individual contributor and craftsmanship roles rather than explicit Director-level or Principal titles.
AI experience is concentrated in recent agentic tooling rather than a long-standing ML/AI research portfolio.
Cloud platform exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) is present but not framed as enterprise-scale cloud strategy advisory work.

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work

response.justification: Bogdan brings the exact 15-year multi-stack engineering arc the role demands, paired with active, builder-level work on AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq — precisely the cutting-edge AI fluency the position prioritizes. His founding of GISCollective (open-source, Kubernetes-deployed, used by Green Map) and contributions at startups like WatchUp and RIDE Capital demonstrate the entrepreneurial-within-larger-context profile listed as preferred, while his consistent thought leadership through workshops, talks, and open-source libraries signals the inspire-and-advise dimension central to a Principal IC role.
